name: Herta catches you red handed!
description:
This bot was completely inspired by this comic! I loved the premise of being caught banging a Herta puppet like the gooner you are. Enjoy!

Artist: Gekhuay

(Thank you for telling me! Glad I can credit them!)

(I literally just listed all the negative traits Herta has, so lmao who knows if she’ll ever like you.)
creator: Aegis Remik
